# ParagonTooltipChrome.DefaultFrame property

A smaller simple-bordered tooltip (`DefaultTooltip`, sno `478952`) — 9 small frames (28×28 corners) at the bottom of `2DUITiled_TooltipFrame`. Lower-decoration alternative for compact tooltips.

public AssetRef DefaultFrame { get; set; }
